notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains only public battlefield events (成虎 vs 浩激流, 费生成 vs 潘平, etc.) and faction relationships that are visible to participants. No private knowledge, secret plans, future-known information, or knowledge gaps are directly supported by the source pointers. All events are ordinary visible combat and command actions. No hidden/secret fact can be extracted without speculation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows characters fighting (成虎 vs 浩激流, 费生成 vs 潘平) but only describes their actions in battle, not their internal motives. Observed behavior is visible (fighting, being ordered to replace, retreating), but any inferred motive would be a psychological leap beyond what the seed directly supports. No direct evidence of fear, desire, or bottomLine for any character.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
马家连续派出成虎、费生成等将领出战，成虎败阵、费生成与潘平激战，存在连战消耗压力。马尚峰作为首领指挥出战，马家作为集体actor有明确军事压力。但压力强度中等，未明确显示马家整体资源枯竭或崩溃，故为medium confidence simulation-candidate。
IF export filter quarantined 5 legacy old-schema branches.
